name: STL Validator CLI (inches → mm², ASCII + Binary)
description: CLI tool accepting a single STL file path (coordinates in inches) and printing JSON {valid, surface_area_mm2, issues}. Handles ASCII and binary STL. Checks manifold integrity, degenerate triangles, duplicate faces, non-manifold edges, and inverted normals. Converts surface area from in² to mm² (×645.16).
